news.headline: Robinhood (HOOD) reported a 115% revenue boost in Q4 2024, fueled by crypto trading and expansions.
news.summary: In the fourth quarter of 2024, Robinhood experienced notable expansion, seeing a remarkable 115% increase in revenues compared to the previous year. This growth was primarily fueled by a substantial rise in cryptocurrency trading activities and strategic business expansions.

news.headline: Fed bids for 4-week bills total $268.5 mln.
Map Your Show launches MYS Insights to aid trade show organizers with revenue tracking, predicting, and exhibitor retention. #Cincinnati #PRnewswire #MYS #analytics #eventperformance
news.summary: In Cincinnati on February 13, 2025, Map Your Show (MYS) introduced MYS Insights, a robust analytics tool aimed at aiding trade show organizers in monitoring and forecasting revenue, pinpointing exhibitors at risk, and enhancing event outcomes. The launch of MYS Insights signifies a significant step forward for Map Your Show in providing valuable insights for event planning and management.

news.headline: Blaqclouds, Inc. appoints 3 new board members for leadership and innovation.
news.summary: Blaqclouds, Inc. recently appointed three new board members in a strategic move to enhance leadership and drive innovation within the company. The additions bring the total number of board members to 12, with the new appointees joining existing members to guide the company's direction. This decision underscores the company's commitment to forward-thinking strategies and ensuring diverse perspectives. With the new appointments, Blaqclouds, Inc. demonstrates its focus on leveraging expertise and experience to propel growth and success in its operations.

news.headline: Illinois Mutual certified as Great Place To Work for 5th year in a row, highlighting commitment to workplace culture.
news.summary: Illinois Mutual Life Insurance Company based in Peoria, IL, has recently been recognized for the fifth year in a row as a Great Place To Work®. This significant achievement highlights the company's dedication to maintaining a positive workplace environment. The company continues to prioritize creating a culture that values and supports its employees.

news.headline: Lead-Acid Battery Market in Southeast Asia to Grow by USD 1.3 Billion from 2025-2029, driven by automotive sector, CAGR of 6.8%. AI-driven market evolution report - Technavio
news.summary: In a recent report, it has been highlighted how artificial intelligence is playing a crucial role in transforming the market landscape. Specifically, the lead-acid battery market in Southeast Asia is projected to witness substantial growth, with an expected increase of USD 1.3 billion anticipated between 2025 and 2029. This growth is predicted to advance at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of nearly 6.8% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: AMD's stock at risk due to unrelated factor; remains uncertain amid rising speculation.
Stanford University partners with Starkey for new study validating balance assessment for fall risk detection, published in Otology & Neurotology.
news.summary: In Eden Prairie, Minnesota, on February 13, 2025, Starkey maintains its leading position in technology and innovation, emphasizing partnerships with researchers worldwide. A study published in Otology & Neurotology underscores this commitment.

news.headline: ONGOING DEADLINE ALERT: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Investigates Claims on Behalf of Investors of Caribou Biosciences
news.summary: Investors who incurred losses in Caribou are being urged by Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson to reach out directly to him to explore their potential options. If securities in Caribou were bought or obtained between July 14, 2023, and July 16, 2024, and investors wish to discuss their situation, they are advised to contact Wilson without delay.

news.headline: Tether criticizes JPMorgan analysts suggesting it might have to sell Bitcoin due to US stablecoin bills.
news.summary: Tether has strongly criticized JPMorgan analysts for suggesting that the issuer might have to sell its holdings of Bitcoin to adhere to recently introduced US stablecoin legislation.

news.headline: Hammocks market set to grow by USD 2.18 billion (26.3% CAGR) from 2025 to 2029 due to rise in outdoor activities.
news.summary: A recent report utilizing artificial intelligence projects significant growth in the hammocks market, with an expected increase of USD 2.18 billion between 2025 and 2029. The market is set to advance at a notable CAGR of approximately 26.3% throughout the forecast period, as detailed by Technavio.

news.headline: Sony exceeds Q3 earnings forecast with 18% sales growth to $28.97 billion, EPS of $0.41. PS5 & streaming drive profits up.
news.summary: Sony Group Corp, the parent company of PlayStation, announced on Thursday a strong fiscal third-quarter performance in 2024 with consolidated sales reaching $28.97 billion (¥4.41 trillion), marking an 18% increase from the previous year. This figure outperformed the analyst consensus estimate of $23.78 billion. Earnings per share stood at $0.41 (¥61.82), surpassing the expected $0.30. In terms of segments, the Game & Network Services division saw a 16% revenue growth to ¥1.68 trillion, leading to a 37% increase in operating income to ¥118.1 billion year-on-year. The boost was attributed to higher sales of non-first-party game titles, increased network service revenue, and hardware sales. Meanwhile, the Music segment also posted positive results with a 14% revenue rise to ¥481.7 billion and a 28% growth in operating income to ¥97.4 billion year-on-year, driven by increased revenues from streaming services in Recorded Music. This news comes alongside a report of Nintendo's Q3 revenue decline, adjustments to outlook and dividend cuts, as well as slowing Switch sales ahead of the next-generation console launch.

news.headline: UK PM Starmer told China's Wang he wants consistent and respectful relations and to deepen trade relations with China.
Investors of Cardlytics can contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP if they suffered losses between March 14, 2024 and August 7, 2024.
news.summary: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Cardlytics to reach out to him for a discussion on potential options. If you bought or obtained securities in Cardlytics during the period of March 14, 2024, to August 7, 2024, and are interested in exploring further, please get in touch with him directly.

news.headline: "Reciprocal tariffs to impact trade; in 18th-19th centuries, tariffs covered 90% of US budget."
news.summary: In the 18th and 19th centuries, trade tariffs accounted for as much as 90% of the annual budget of the United States federal government.

news.headline: Civix appoints Matt Walker as COO to drive growth and operational excellence in public sector software solutions.
news.summary: Heathrow, Florida - On February 13, 2025, Civix, a prominent provider of public sector software solutions, disclosed the selection of Matt Walker as their new Chief Operating Officer. As the COO, Walker will be responsible for overseeing Civix's customer-focused departments to maintain high operational standards and foster creativity in the organization.

news.headline: Habitat for Humanity of Ventura County partners with 8 local families for first-time homeownership in Camarillo. Celebratory groundbreaking event held on Jan. 25 for 8 new affordable homes.
news.summary: Community members, volunteers, and future residents came together in Camarillo, California on January 25, 2025, to commemorate the initiation of construction on eight new affordable homes. This event marked an important milestone in addressing housing needs in the area. The project is set to benefit a significant number of families and individuals by providing them with accessible housing options. The initiative received widespread support from different sectors of the community, showcasing a collaborative effort towards improving living conditions for many.

news.headline: Sharp releases 1 monochrome and 3 color A4 printing solutions with advanced security, mobile compatibility. MONTVALE, N.J., Feb. 13, 2025.
news.summary: In Montvale, New Jersey on February 13, 2025, Sharp Imaging and Information Company of America (SIICA), a division of Sharp Electronics, announced the launch of one monochrome and three color printers. These printers are designed to offer advanced security features, more sustainable designs, and mobile compatibility. This move aims to enhance functionality for users.

news.headline: Aragon Research releases its first Globe™ for Strategic Response Management, analyzing 14 providers in an emerging market.
news.summary: In Morgan Hill, California on February 13, 2025, Aragon Research released its inaugural Aragon Research Globe™ for Strategic Response Management (SRM). The comprehensive report evaluates 14 prominent companies within this developing sector, evaluating their strengths and trends for the year 2025.

news.headline: EV Charging Summit & Expo in Las Vegas to address growing EV adoption. 200+ speakers, 220 exhibitors, 5,000 attendees expected.
news.summary: As electric vehicle (EV) adoption continues to rise rapidly, the question arises: can charging infrastructure keep up? The upcoming 2025 EV Charging Summit & Expo will address this and other crucial issues in the evolving EV economy. The event will host 200+ expert speakers, showcase 220 exhibitors, and draw over 5,000 attendees from various sectors. The summit aims to identify key players in the industry and explore strategies to meet the growing demand for EV charging solutions.

news.headline: Gupshup introduces 15 pre-built AI Agents for businesses to boost AI adoption, aiding industry growth.
news.summary: In Bengaluru, India on February 13, 2025, a prominent Conversational AI platform, Gupshup, introduced its AI Agent Library consisting of 15 pre-built and customizable AI Agents. These agents are specialized with industry expertise and are aimed at assisting businesses in a significant way.

news.headline: D.C. United unveils 2025 Soul Kit inspired by D.C.'s Funk, Soul, and Go-Go legacy, pays homage to city's culture.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in Washington, D.C., the D.C. United soccer team revealed their 2025 Soul Kit, which is the team's latest away kit. This kit is a tribute to the city's renowned Funk, Soul, and Go-Go history. It draws inspiration from Washington, D.C.'s musical legacy and cultural strength.

news.headline: Vouch acquires StartSure Insurance Services, Inc., expands capabilities, and announces Series D financing led by Allegis Capital.
news.summary: In San Francisco on February 13, 2025, Vouch, a prominent business insurance provider catering to high-growth firms, declared the signing of a definitive agreement for the acquisition of the team and client base of StartSure Insurance Services, Inc. This move marks a strategic decision for Vouch to expand its operations and strengthen its market position.

news.headline: "Second season of 'Three Meals, Four Seasons' returns, joint production by China Media Group and Ministry of Commerce."
news.summary: In Beijing on February 13, 2025, the second season of "Three Meals, Four Seasons" has been launched following a successful first season. This program is a collaborative effort between China Media Group and the Ministry of Commerce, focusing on seasonal food and cultural tourism. The large-scale program aims to showcase the diversity and richness of Chinese cuisine and cultural heritage. This season promises to be even more engaging and informative than before, with a significant increase in viewership numbers expected based on the success of the previous season. Stay tuned for an exciting exploration of culinary delights and cultural experiences across different seasons.

news.headline: Aspen Dental and Ivoclar introduce Signature Elite Denture, revolutionizing patient care with precision and innovation.
news.summary: In Chicago on February 13, 2025, Aspen Dental® collaborated with dental innovation leader Ivoclar to launch the Signature Elite Denture. This new product combines accessibility, precision, and innovation to enhance patient care. The partnership between the two companies has resulted in significant advancements in the dental industry.

news.headline: Sacramento State earns 'high research activity' spot, named R2 institution by Carnegie Foundation.
news.summary: In Sacramento, California on February 13, 2025, the Carnegie Foundation for the Advancement of Teaching acknowledged Sacramento State for its significant research endeavors and the substantial count of doctoral degrees granted by declaring the University as a Research 2 (R2) organization. This recognition highlights the institution's commitment to research and the education sector.

news.headline: Whitepaper by Sage Growth Partners & GroundGame.Health offers solutions to transform US healthcare. Released on Feb. 13, 2025.
news.summary: A recently published industry whitepaper from Sage Growth Partners and GroundGame.Health delves into strategies to revolutionize the American healthcare system. Revealed on February 13, 2025, in Baltimore, this collaboration aims to bring change through innovative solutions. Sage Growth Partners, known for its proficiency in healthcare growth strategy and marketing, has partnered with GroundGame.Health to address pressing issues in the industry. The whitepaper discusses key insights and recommendations to enhance the healthcare ecosystem, offering a comprehensive approach to healthcare transformation. This initiative highlights the importance of implementing effective strategies to improve healthcare services and meet the growing needs of the population. The partnership between these two entities signifies a significant step towards advancing the healthcare sector.

news.headline: NY Fed: Auto loan delinquency rates remain elevated.
NY Fed: Credit card balances rose $45 billion from Q3 to $1.21 trillion.
NY Fed: Q4 delinquency transition rates steady except for credit cards, which edged higher.
Poland loyalty programs market set to grow by 16.6% this year, reaching $1.19 billion. CAGR of 18.6% from 2025.
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report on the Poland Loyalty Programs Market projects significant growth, with an expected annual increase of 16.6%. By 2025, the market is forecasted to reach a value of US$1.19 billion, showcasing a compound annual growth rate of 18.6%. The report provides detailed insights on over 50 key performance indicators related to loyalty programs trends across various sectors, operational metrics, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics. It has been made available on ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.headline: INFINITI showcases lineup at 2025 Canadian International Auto Show, including new 2025 QX80 SUV and QX60 Black Edition.
news.summary: INFINITI is set to feature its complete range at the Canadian International Auto Show held at the Metro Toronto Convention Centre from February 14th to 23rd, 2025. The lineup includes the newly launched 2025 QX80 flagship luxury SUV and the QX60 with its latest eye-catching Black Edition. The event aims to offer visitors a preview of INFINITI Distinction, embodying the brand's luxury ownership experience.

news.headline: Stock market surges as AppLovin soars 38%, unique hold rule triggered, growth companies outperform value peers.
news.summary: In the Russell indexes, growth companies outperformed their value counterparts, with a 38% surge in AppLovin triggering a unique hold rule as indexes rose.

news.headline: Nissan Canada celebrates 60th anniversary with 2 project builds and debuts 3 new vehicles at 2025 CIAS. ARIYA available for test drive.
news.summary: Nissan marks its 60th year in Canada at the 2025 Canadian International Auto Show in Mississauga, Ontario. The event highlights two project builds demonstrating how Nissan vehicles can embody excitement. Alongside, Nissan unveils three new 2025 models - the Kicks, Murano, and Armada. The electric ARIYA will be featured on the indoor EV Test Track for test drives. Visit CIAS from February 14-23, 2025, to experience these new releases.

news.headline: American Woodmark Corp. to hold Q3 conference call on Feb 27, 2025 at 8:30am Eastern Time, available on americanwoodmark.com.
news.summary: American Woodmark Corporation (NASDAQ: AMWD) headquartered in Winchester, Virginia, has announced plans to hold a conference call to review its third-quarter results on February 27, 2025. The event will commence at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time and will be broadcasted live on their website, americanwoodmark.com. Furthermore, an online replay will be accessible for a duration of 30 days following the call. Additionally, a telephonic replay will also be made available for those unable to join the live webcast. This initiative allows investors and interested individuals to stay informed about the company’s performance and financial updates.

news.headline: Hyatt Hotels' stock falls after Q4 earnings miss. Revenue was $1.602B, EPS at 42 cents vs expected 78 cents. RevPAR up 5% in Q4, 4.6% for 2024. EBITDA grew 2.4% to $255M. 81 new hotels added in Q4. More details on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Hyatt Hotels Corporation (NYSE:H) saw a decline in shares on Thursday following its fourth-quarter financial report. The company posted adjusted earnings per share of 42 cents, falling short of the expected 78 cents. The quarterly sales figure stood at $1.602 billion, missing the projected $1.658 billion. Comparable system-wide hotels Revenue per Available Room (RevPAR) witnessed a growth of 5.0% in Q4 and 4.6% throughout 2024. Adjusted EBITDA showed a 2.4% year-over-year increase, totaling $255 million. Adjusted EBITDA spiked by 20.3% for the quarter when factoring out the net impact of asset sales. Hyatt welcomed 81 new hotels (equating to 20,721 rooms) to its portfolio in the fourth quarter. Among the notable additions were Grand Hyatt Deer Valley and Dreams Madeira Resort.

US Defence Secretary Hegseth: Neither Putin nor Zelenskiy will get all they want.

GemCap Solutions, LLC will auction off personal property of Candy Club, LLC, Candy Club Holdings, Inc., Candy Club Investment, LLC, and Candy Club Acquisition, LLC. Sale conducted by GemCap Holdings, LLC.
news.summary: On February 13, 2025, in San Antonio, GemCap Solutions, LLC, acting as the servicer and attorney-in-fact for GemCap Holdings, LLC, the secured party, will conduct a public sale in accordance with Section 9-610 of the Uniform Commercial Code. The sale aims to find the highest and best bidder for the secured assets.

news.headline: Baltic Horizon Fund to delist SDRs from Nasdaq Stockholm in August 2025 at the earliest.
news.summary: Northern Horizon Capital AS plans to terminate the Baltic Horizon Fund's Swedish Depositary Receipts (SDRs) program and remove the SDRs from Nasdaq Stockholm. The delisting is likely to occur by August 2025.

news.headline: EXEO Group partners with Tonkean for process automation; involved in diverse initiatives across domains.
news.summary: EXEO Group Inc., a multinational provider of engineering and system solutions based in Palo Alto, California, revealed its partnership with Tonkean, a unique intake and orchestration platform. This collaboration signifies Tonkean as the primary platform partner for EXEO Group's process automation and orchestration projects. EXEO Group operates across various sectors such as telecommunications, construction, civil engineering, renewable energy, and systems integration. The company is known for managing diverse projects, with involvement in multiple domains and industries worldwide.

news.headline: Broadvoice's CCaaS platform, GoContact, has achieved an industry-leading Net Promoter Score® for customer loyalty and satisfaction in Los Angeles.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Broadvoice's CCaaS platform, GoContact, has achieved an exceptional Net Promoter Score® for customer loyalty and satisfaction. This industry-leading score underscores the high level of satisfaction among users.

news.headline: Nenana to get fiber broadband thanks to $3M grant from NTIA, providing service to 362 households, 30 businesses, and 9 institutions.
news.summary: Residents in the Athabascan community of Nenana, Alaska, are set to benefit greatly from a recent development in broadband services. Through a grant from the National Telecommunications and Information Administration (NTIA) under the Tribal Broadband Connectivity Program Round 2, a partnership between the Nenana Native Association, Tanana Chiefs Conference, and Alaska Communications will provide fiber to the home service to 362 households, 30 businesses, and nine anchor institutions. This initiative aims to significantly improve connectivity and access to high-speed internet in the area, bringing about transformative changes for the community.

news.headline: Ciena provides Internet access to proxy materials for its 2025 Annual Meeting.
news.summary: In Hanover, Maryland, Ciena® Corporation, a company specializing in networking systems, services, and software, has released proxy materials for its upcoming 2025 Annual Meeting. Shareholders can now access important documents related to the meeting.

news.headline: Morningstar and SS&C form alliance to integrate Direct Advisory Suite with Black Diamond, offering robust wealth platform.
news.summary: Morningstar, Inc. (Nasdaq: MORN) and SS&C Technologies, Inc. have partnered to integrate SS&C's Black Diamond® Wealth Platform with Morningstar's newly launched Direct Advisory Suite. This collaboration will provide the first wealth platform to offer this integrated solution. The Direct Advisory Suite offers comprehensive investment data, research, portfolio construction, holdings-based analysis, and client engagement features. Morningstar's award-winning technology will enhance portfolio account management through this alliance.
